column1: PACT CA23138 WG3 Contested Glossary Template
Purpose: compile a shared (contested) glossary that exposes multiple perspectives to support inclusive decision‑making in port‑city energy transition.
How to use: populate Glossary_Entries. Use lookups to keep coding consistent. Track status and version. Cite sources. Link decisions.
License suggestion: CC BY 4.0. Versioning: SemVer. Stewardship: WG3 editorial cell with quarterly reviews.
